stonetop.summary: The 'rage drake' — ten feet of knives, quills, and fury.

system.concept: The 'rage drake' — ten feet of knives, quills, and fury.
system.description: The mighty 'rage drake,' almost ten feet tall and twenty feet from nose to tail-tip. Its jaws are full of knives, blood-red patterns surround its eyes, and a frill of feathered quills sprouts from its neck and runs down its back. Maybe a half-dozen of them stalk the whole @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6kt1b8ozEREDCi4k]{Great Wood}, and one hasn't been spotted near @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6yScslDfqrcCQ6CJ]{Stonetop} for generations (Tor be praised).

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** They prey mostly on large game (wisents, tal gerdwyr, etc.). They'll attack people, but rarely hunt them.
**Something useful:** They attack people to establish dominance, seeing us as rivals. An appropriate offering or show of obeisance might calm one enough for you to get the hell out of there.
